\tzpentry{ID3509}{Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3509 introduces Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \boxed{\mathcal{E}^{(n)}_{\rm EM}=\tfrac12\big(E^{(n)}_i E^{i}_{(n)} + B^{(n)}_i B^{i}_{(n)}\big).} \]
